issue.title: adguard.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/ko/welcome.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fko%2Fwelcome.html) ### Comment > Since yesterday, enabling AdGuard has caused all internet connectivity to stop working. I tried disabling each of the four protections individually — ad blocking, tracking protection, DNS protection, and the firewall — and also turned them all off at the same time, but the internet remains unavailable whenever AdGuard is turned on. This affects not only Chrome but also messaging apps, which are unable to send messages due to the loss of internet connection. The issue persists after multiple updates, which is why I am submitting this error report. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/l7rr20pakf4kgk8cs8gsco0c8wokcg0pp3w4v3bjs0.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/478w8x5zeo84k08gw8sww8ogwsoc8ggk150gh45sdc.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.3 System version: | `Android 16` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
EasyList

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Language-specific:**
YousList,
List-KR AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h),
Disable cache for third-party requests

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests,
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.cloudflare.com/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/android/filters/15_optimized.txt`, `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adguardteam/HostlistsRegistry@main/assets/filter_15.txt`, `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adguardteam/HostlistsRegistry@main/assets/filter_25.txt` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js`
`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.3&system_version=Android+16&browser=chrome&filters=244.2.227.3.11.101&dns_servers=https%3A%2F%2Fdns.cloudflare.com%2Fdns-query&userscripts=https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.meta.js%2C%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40filteringdev%2Ftinyshield%40latest%2Fdist%2FtinyShield.user.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.filters=https%3A%2F%2Ffilters.adtidy.org%2Fandroid%2Ffilters%2F15_optimized.txt%2C%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fgh%2Fadguardteam%2FHostlistsRegistry%40main%2Fassets%2Ffilter_15.txt%2C%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fgh%2Fadguardteam%2FHostlistsRegistry%40main%2Fassets%2Ffilter_25.txt&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.ip=208.54.104.184&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=true&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid&dns.timeout=5000)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://technologymagazine.com/news](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftechnologymagazine.com%2Fnews) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/4m5wv9psjda84s4ogw4k0s00g4ckooolatwrst9tyo.jpg?nc=1)

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Social Widgets:**

**Annoyances:**

uBlock Origin – Badware risks,

AdGuard Russian filter Custom filters: | `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js`,
`https://gitflic.ru/project/magnolia1234/bypass-paywalls-clean-filters/blob/raw?file=bpc-paywall-filter.txt`,
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/refs/heads/master/filters/ubo-link-shorteners.txt` AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | yes Tracking protection: | **General**:

Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing first-party cookies (4320h),
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h)

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC,
Block Push API

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.3&system_version=Android+16&browser=firefox+mobile&filters=208.13.17.3.257.14.2.1.11.255.118.4&custom_filters=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40filteringdev%2Ftinyshield%40latest%2Fdist%2FtinyShield.user.js%2Chttps%3A%2F%2Fgitflic.ru%2Fproject%2Fmagnolia1234%2Fbypass-paywalls-clean-filters%2Fblob%2Fraw%3Ffile%3Dbpc-paywall-filter.txt%2Chttps%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2FuBlockOrigin%2FuAssets%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmaster%2Ffilters%2Fubo-link-shorteners.txt&userscripts=https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=true&dns.enabled=false&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.push=true&stealth.location=false&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid)
